summary: Iteration 19 (Compliance / OpenSanctions Path C+) backend verification passed. All 20 tests across test_iteration17_kyc_error.py, test_iteration18_kyc_force_new.py, and test_iteration19_compliance_health.py pass. Live localhost:8001 smoke checks confirm: kyc/status now returns sanctions_check.degraded + degraded_reason fields; admin endpoints properly locked down (403 'Admin endpoints not configured' with no ADMIN_EMAILS env set); login, wallet/assets, and remit/quote all 200 under default COMPLIANCE_STRICT_MODE=off.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py has grown large (>3100 lines) — consider splitting into modules (auth, kyc, remit, admin, compliance) in a future iteration. Not blocking iter 19.
seed_data_creation: None. Used pre-seeded smoke user smoketest@vaulted.app. Tests that mutate kyc.sanctions clean up via _reset_user_sanctions fixture pattern.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 19 shipped OpenSanctions safe-fallback + admin diagnostics + COMPLIANCE_STRICT_MODE flag. Key surfaces added: (a) screen_sanctions() now returns {degraded: bool, degraded_reason: 'no_api_key'|'no_name'|'api_status_N'|'unreachable'}; (b) GET /api/admin/compliance/health and POST /api/admin/compliance/screen gated by ADMIN_EMAILS env (CSV, empty by default → 403 'Admin endpoints not configured'); (c) /api/kyc/status now surfaces sanctions_check.degraded & degraded_reason even when user has no sanctions doc; (d) COMPLIANCE_STRICT_MODE flag on /api/remit/send returns 503 detail={error:'sanctions_screening_unavailable', degraded_reason}. Default STRICT_MODE is off. Test fixtures use motor + AsyncIOMotorClient with fresh event loops to avoid loop-closed errors from prior TestClient runs. Frontend was NOT touched in iter 19; no FE regression testing performed.
